name: Office of Roazian Enforcement
summary: Roaz’s primary institution of law enforcement, anti-magic policing, and judicial execution.
day_to_day: Runs checkpoints, processes prisoners, conducts raids, and implements court rulings.
who_works_there: Officers, magistrate liaisons, prison overseers, checkpoint staff, covert specialists.
who_uses_it: Residents seeking rulings or security, merchants, accused criminals, bounty actors.
authority: Can investigate, arrest, sentence through lawful channels, and administer prison labor programs.
public_manifestation: Checkpoints, armored patrols, public punishments, seizure notices, interrogation halls.
conflict_or_bottleneck: High authority invites corruption risk and public fear even when the institution is competent.
